title: Artoria
description: A resourcepack that adds Artoria Pendragon's Excalibur and Caliburn from Fate
body:
**It is highly reccomended to use versions above 1.21.5 as the models in lower versions are not as accurate due to custom model limitations before 1.21.6**

## Dependencies:
- **1.21.5+ No dependencies**
- **1.21.4 and below requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

## About:
A resourcepack that adds Artoria Pendragons Excalibur and Caliburn from Fate as alternate sword models when an iron sword or higher is renamed to the respective sword.

Also adds 2 different frieren plushies as alternate totem models by renaming a totem, aswell as her staff as an alternate sword model.

## To use the models:
- Excalibur: Rename an iron sword or higher to "Excalibur"
- Caliburn: Rename an iron sword or higher to "Caliburn"
- Frieren's Staff: Rename an iron sword or higher to "Frieren Staff"
- Frieren Plushes: Rename a totem of undying to "Frieren" or "Other Frieren"

## Compatibility:
- **[Hold my Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)**

**To report bugs, leave suggestions or ask questions please use the [Discord](https://discord.gg/yyu96tfSJw)**
